syn_flood.description: Detects SYN flood attacks when threshold of SYN packets from a single IP is exceeded

port_scan.description: Detects port scanning when a source IP connects to too many unique ports

suspicious_ports.description: Flags connections to known malware/C2 ports

large_payload.description: Detects unusually large packet payloads that may indicate data exfiltration

dns_tunnel.description: Detects potential DNS tunneling based on high DNS query volume
